TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Sakizaya, story: skzyNr-frog_panay
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: hang izaw kya cacay a wawa za izaw ku nicakepan nuheni tu balaut palaculen niza i tiza i bubu.
S.PHON: ħaŋ izaw kja ʦaʦaj a wawa za izaw ku niʦakəpan nuħəni tu bar~ɾaut par~ɾaʦur~ɾən niza i tiza i bubu.
S.FORM: hang izaw kya cacay a wawa za izaw ku nicakepan nuheni tu balaut palaculen niza i tiza i bubu.
S.PHON: ħaŋ izaw kja ʦaʦaj a wawa za izaw ku niʦakəpan nuħəni tu bar~ɾaut par~ɾaʦur~ɾən niza i tiza i bubu.
S.TRANSL: 有一個小孩抓到一隻青蛙,放到籃子中.
There was a child, and he caught a frog and put it in a basket.

S.FORM: iza kya balaut i labu cekulentu nya wacu.
S.PHON: iza kja bar~ɾaut i r~ɾabu ʦəkur~ɾəntu nja waʦu.
S.FORM: iza kya balaut i labu cekulentu nya wacu.
S.PHON: iza kja bar~ɾaut i r~ɾabu ʦəkur~ɾəntu nja waʦu.
S.TRANSL: 狗往下看著在裡頭的青蛙.
The dog looked down on the frog, which was inside of a cage.

S.FORM: maidih kyai kya wacu a mukan tya balaut.
S.PHON: maidiħ kjai kja waʦu a mukan tja bar~ɾaut.
S.FORM: maidih kyai kya wacu a mukan tya balaut.
S.PHON: maidiħ kjai kja waʦu a mukan tja bar~ɾaut.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗可能想吃那隻青蛙吧!
That dog might want to eat that frog.

S.FORM: mabi' satu kya kya wawa a tya wacu.
S.PHON: mabiʔ~ʡ satu kja kja wawa a tja waʦu.
S.FORM: mabi' satu kya kya wawa a tya wacu.
S.PHON: mabiʔ~ʡ satu kja kja wawa a tja waʦu.
S.TRANSL: 小孩跟狗在睡覺.
That child and the dog were sleeping.

S.FORM: meya melaw hantu kya balaut mutahkal kya balaut mulaliw.
S.PHON: məa mər~ɾaw ħantu kja bar~ɾaut mutaħkar~ɾ kja bar~ɾaut mur~ɾar~ɾiw.
S.FORM: meya melaw hantu kya balaut mutahkal kya balaut mulaliw.
S.PHON: məa mər~ɾaw ħantu kja bar~ɾaut mutaħkar~ɾ kja bar~ɾaut mur~ɾar~ɾiw.
S.TRANSL: 看到那隻青蛙跑掉了.
that frog ran away.

S.FORM: matalaw nima ku lubuan nanaytu kaku a sa kyai kya balucu' mulaliw kya balaut.
S.PHON: matar~ɾaw nima ku r~ɾubuan nanajtu kaku a sa kjai kja bar~ɾuʦuʔ~ʡ mur~ɾar~ɾiw kja bar~ɾaut.
S.FORM: matalaw nima ku lubuan nanaytu kaku a sa kyai kya balucu' mulaliw kya balaut.
S.PHON: matar~ɾaw nima ku r~ɾubuan nanajtu kaku a sa kjai kja bar~ɾuʦuʔ~ʡ mur~ɾar~ɾiw kja bar~ɾaut.
S.TRANSL: 那隻青蛙心想會一直被關就跑走了.
That frog thought that it would be confined and then ran away.

S.FORM: macukat satu kya wawa.
S.PHON: maʦukat satu kja wawa.
S.FORM: macukat satu kya wawa.
S.PHON: maʦukat satu kja wawa.
S.TRANSL: 小孩醒來了.
That child woke up.

S.FORM: nayitu aca kya balaut.
S.PHON: najitu aʦa kja bar~ɾaut.
S.FORM: nayitu aca kya balaut.
S.PHON: najitu aʦa kja bar~ɾaut.
S.TRANSL: 原來青蛙不見了.
It turned out that the frog disappeared.

S.FORM: aya nayitu kya balaut sa kya wawa a tya wacu.
S.PHON: aja najitu kja bar~ɾaut sa kja wawa a tja waʦu.
S.FORM: aya nayitu kya balaut sa kya wawa a tya wacu.
S.PHON: aja najitu kja bar~ɾaut sa kja wawa a tja waʦu.
S.TRANSL: 孩子對狗說:「青蛙不見了.」
That child said to the dog that the frog disappeared.

S.FORM: mikilimtu kuheni sa.
S.PHON: mikir~ɾimtu kuħəni sa.
S.FORM: mikilimtu kuheni sa.
S.PHON: mikir~ɾimtu kuħəni sa.
S.TRANSL: 他們去找 .
They searched for .

S.FORM: tuhtuhen niza ku ku ku kucu niza mituhtuh.
S.PHON: tuħtuħən niza ku ku ku kuʦu niza mituħtuħ.
S.FORM: tuhtuhen niza ku ku ku kucu niza mituhtuh.
S.PHON: tuħtuħən niza ku ku ku kuʦu niza mituħtuħ.
S.TRANSL: 他把鞋子倒過來.
He placed the shoes upside down.

S.FORM: mumuktu i tiza pabubuan kya wacu mikilim tya balaut.
S.PHON: mumuktu i tiza pabubuan kja waʦu mikir~ɾim tja bar~ɾaut.
S.FORM: mumuktu i tiza pabubuan kya wacu mikilim tya balaut.
S.PHON: mumuktu i tiza pabubuan kja waʦu mikir~ɾim tja bar~ɾaut.
S.TRANSL: 狗鑽進籠中去找青蛙.
That dog got into the cage to find the frog.

S.FORM: miawawen nya hiya nya wawa.
S.PHON: miawawən nja ħija nja wawa.
S.FORM: miawawen nya hiya nya wawa.
S.PHON: miawawən nja ħija nja wawa.
S.TRANSL: 那小孩呼喊著.
That child yelled.

S.FORM: kina cu kina bulubulut satu kya wacu kina cebucebu' satu haluwacuwacu satu a maidih a mulaliw.
S.PHON: kina ʦu kina bur~ɾubur~ɾut satu kja waʦu kina ʦəbuʦəbuʔ~ʡ satu ħar~ɾuwaʦuwaʦu satu a maidiħ a mur~ɾar~ɾiw.
S.FORM: kina cu kina bulubulut satu kya wacu kina cebucebu' satu haluwacuwacu satu a maidih a mulaliw.
S.PHON: kina ʦu kina bur~ɾubur~ɾut satu kja waʦu kina ʦəbuʦəbuʔ~ʡ satu ħar~ɾuwaʦuwaʦu satu a maidiħ a mur~ɾar~ɾiw.
S.TRANSL: 連狗都想衝出去及跳進水裡.
Even the dog sprang and wanted to plunge into water.

S.FORM: mikilimtu aca kya wawa tya wacu matepatu niza kya wacu.
S.PHON: mikir~ɾimtu aʦa kja wawa tja waʦu matəpatu niza kja waʦu.
S.FORM: mikilimtu aca kya wawa tya wacu matepatu niza kya wacu.
S.PHON: mikir~ɾimtu aʦa kja wawa tja waʦu matəpatu niza kja waʦu.
S.TRANSL: 小孩要去找狗了, 結果他找到那隻狗.
The child searched for that dog and he found it.

S.FORM: abibi han niza kya wacu initu aca kina wacu sa.
S.PHON: abibi ħan niza kja waʦu initu aʦa kina waʦu sa.
S.FORM: abibi han niza kya wacu initu aca kina wacu sa.
S.PHON: abibi ħan niza kja waʦu initu aʦa kina waʦu sa.
S.TRANSL: 他抱著狗, 原來狗在這.
He held the dog, which was here formerly.

S.FORM: mikilim henay kya wacu tya balaut.
S.PHON: mikir~ɾim ħənaj kja waʦu tja bar~ɾaut.
S.FORM: mikilim henay kya wacu tya balaut.
S.PHON: mikir~ɾim ħənaj kja waʦu tja bar~ɾaut.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗還在找青蛙.
That dog was still looking for the frog.

S.FORM: ya balaut miawawtu kuheni tahkaltu kuheni mikilim tya balaut.
S.PHON: ja bar~ɾaut miawawtu kuħəni taħkar~ɾtu kuħəni mikir~ɾim tja bar~ɾaut.
S.FORM: ya balaut miawawtu kuheni tahkaltu kuheni mikilim tya balaut.
S.PHON: ja bar~ɾaut miawawtu kuħəni taħkar~ɾtu kuħəni mikir~ɾim tja bar~ɾaut.
S.TRANSL: 他們呼喚著, 他們走出去找青蛙.
They yelled and went out to search for frog.

S.FORM: mamelawtu niza ku E tatekuh.
S.PHON: mamər~ɾawtu niza ku ə tatəkuħ.
S.FORM: mamelawtu niza ku E tatekuh.
S.PHON: mamər~ɾawtu niza ku ə tatəkuħ.
S.TRANSL: 他看到虎頭蜂.
He saw hornets.

S.FORM: makatengil ku tatekuh tahkaltu tu tu makatengiltu nipiawaw nuheni tya tya pikilim nuheni tya balaut.
S.PHON: makatəŋir~ɾ ku tatəkuħ taħkar~ɾtu tu tu makatəŋir~ɾtu nipiawaw nuħəni tja tja pikir~ɾim nuħəni tja bar~ɾaut.
S.FORM: makatengil ku tatekuh tahkaltu tu tu makatengiltu nipiawaw nuheni tya tya pikilim nuheni tya balaut.
S.PHON: makatəŋir~ɾ ku tatəkuħ taħkar~ɾtu tu tu makatəŋir~ɾtu nipiawaw nuħəni tja tja pikir~ɾim nuħəni tja bar~ɾaut.
S.TRANSL: 虎頭蜂聽到他們出來尋找青蛙的呼喚聲.
Hornets heard sounds made by the child and the dog when they were searching for the frog.

S.FORM: makamelaw kya wacu tya tya hiya tya tatekuh.
S.PHON: makamər~ɾaw kja waʦu tja tja ħija tja tatəkuħ.
S.FORM: makamelaw kya wacu tya tya hiya tya tatekuh.
S.PHON: makamər~ɾaw kja waʦu tja tja ħija tja tatəkuħ.
S.TRANSL: 狗看到虎頭蜂.
The dog saw hornets.

S.FORM: E sapizawisen ciniza tya tatekuh.
S.PHON: ə sapizawisən ʦiniza tja tatəkuħ.
S.FORM: E sapizawisen ciniza tya tatekuh.
S.PHON: ə sapizawisən ʦiniza tja tatəkuħ.
S.TRANSL: 狗想摘蜂窩.
The dog wanted to pluck the beehives.

S.FORM: mehantu kya hiya kya wawa misusu' tu buhang.
S.PHON: məħantu kja ħija kja wawa misusuʔ~ʡ tu buħaŋ.
S.FORM: mehantu kya hiya kya wawa misusu' tu buhang.
S.PHON: məħantu kja ħija kja wawa misusuʔ~ʡ tu buħaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 那小孩被看到把手放到洞中.
It was seen that the child put his hand inside of the hole.

S.FORM: mitahkal satu u kalabaw kyai u kalabaw.
S.PHON: mitaħkar~ɾ satu u kar~ɾabaw kjai u kar~ɾabaw.
S.FORM: mitahkal satu u kalabaw kyai u kalabaw.
S.PHON: mitaħkar~ɾ satu u kar~ɾabaw kjai u kar~ɾabaw.
S.TRANSL: 出來的可能是田鼠.
What came out might be voles.

S.FORM: izaw kya kalabaw makalat nya kalabaw ku pising nya wawa.
S.PHON: izaw kja kar~ɾabaw makar~ɾat nja kar~ɾabaw ku pisiŋ nja wawa.
S.FORM: izaw kya kalabaw makalat nya kalabaw ku pising nya wawa.
S.PHON: izaw kja kar~ɾabaw makar~ɾat nja kar~ɾabaw ku pisiŋ nja wawa.
S.TRANSL: 有田鼠而且咬了小孩的臉.
There was a vole, which bit the face of the child.

S.FORM: kya wacu maidih mikalic ni mizawis tya tatekuh.
S.PHON: kja waʦu maidiħ mikar~ɾiʦ ni mizawis tja tatəkuħ.
S.FORM: kya wacu maidih mikalic ni mizawis tya tatekuh.
S.PHON: kja waʦu maidiħ mikar~ɾiʦ ni mizawis tja tatəkuħ.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗想爬上去摘虎頭蜂蜂窩.
That dog wanted to climbed up and pluck the beehives.

S.FORM: sabeleng satu kya tatekuh namizawis kya wa wacu.
S.PHON: sabər~ɾəŋ satu kja tatəkuħ namizawis kja wa waʦu.
S.FORM: sabeleng satu kya tatekuh namizawis kya wa wacu.
S.PHON: sabər~ɾəŋ satu kja tatəkuħ namizawis kja wa waʦu.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗摘蜂窩, 一群蜜蜂飛過來.
That dog wanted to pluck the beehives and there came a swarm of hornets.

S.FORM: iza kya E u hiya u edu mutahkal.
S.PHON: iza kja ə u ħija u ədu mutaħkar~ɾ.
S.FORM: iza kya E u hiya u edu mutahkal.
S.PHON: iza kja ə u ħija u ədu mutaħkar~ɾ.
S.TRANSL: 一隻老鼠跑出來.
There came out a mouse.

S.FORM: E ya han kya wawa mukilim tya edu.
S.PHON: ə ja ħan kja wawa mukir~ɾim tja ədu.
S.FORM: E ya han kya wawa mukilim tya edu.
S.PHON: ə ja ħan kja wawa mukir~ɾim tja ədu.
S.TRANSL: 那小孩找老鼠.
That child searched for the mouse.

S.FORM: tatuay sa han melaw han sa ini i sasa kya edu.
S.PHON: tatuaj sa ħan mər~ɾaw ħan sa ini i sasa kja ədu.
S.FORM: tatuay sa han melaw han sa ini i sasa kya edu.
S.PHON: tatuaj sa ħan mər~ɾaw ħan sa ini i sasa kja ədu.

TRANSL.notes: 他以為(老鼠)去哪裡,結果老鼠在下面.

S.TRANSL: 他以為 去哪裡,結果老鼠在下面.
He wondered where the mouse was, and it was under there.

S.FORM: mikalic kya wawa a tya mimelaw tya buhang nya kilang.
S.PHON: mikar~ɾiʦ kja wawa a tja mimər~ɾaw tja buħaŋ nja kir~ɾaŋ.
S.FORM: mikalic kya wawa a tya mimelaw tya buhang nya kilang.
S.PHON: mikar~ɾiʦ kja wawa a tja mimər~ɾaw tja buħaŋ nja kir~ɾaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 小孩爬上樹要看樹洞.
That child climbed up to see the tree hole.

S.FORM: mapulintu aca melaw han sa izaw ku ayam i labu nya buhang nya ayam.
S.PHON: mapur~ɾintu aʦa mər~ɾaw ħan sa izaw ku ajam i r~ɾabu nja buħaŋ nja ajam.
S.FORM: mapulintu aca melaw han sa izaw ku ayam i labu nya buhang nya ayam.
S.PHON: mapur~ɾintu aʦa mər~ɾaw ħan sa izaw ku ajam i r~ɾabu nja buħaŋ nja ajam.
S.TRANSL: 跌倒之後看到樹洞裡有鳥.

TRANSL.notes: (He) fell down and saw birds in the tree hole.

S.TRANSL: fell down and saw birds in the tree hole.

S.FORM: matawid kyai kya wawa mapulin ma matienang.
S.PHON: matawid kjai kja wawa mapur~ɾin ma matiənaŋ.
S.FORM: matawid kyai kya wawa mapulin ma matienang.
S.PHON: matawid kjai kja wawa mapur~ɾin ma matiənaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 小孩可能被嚇到之後跌倒,跌得四腳朝天.
It might be that the child was shocked and fell on his back.

S.FORM: i u yu tahkal sa kya ayam i tiza i i buhang nya kilang.
S.PHON: i u ju taħkar~ɾ sa kja ajam i tiza i i buħaŋ nja kir~ɾaŋ.
S.FORM: i u yu tahkal sa kya ayam i tiza i i buhang nya kilang.
S.PHON: i u ju taħkar~ɾ sa kja ajam i tiza i i buħaŋ nja kir~ɾaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 小鳥從樹洞出來.
A bird came out of the tree hole.

S.FORM: melaw han u deku' u deku'.
S.PHON: mər~ɾaw ħan u dəkuʔ~ʡ u dəkuʔ~ʡ.
S.FORM: melaw han u deku' u deku'.
S.PHON: mər~ɾaw ħan u dəkuʔ~ʡ u dəkuʔ~ʡ.
S.TRANSL: 看到貓頭鷹.
see owls.

S.FORM: kina wacu mulaliw lalaba'en nu tatekuh.
S.PHON: kina waʦu mur~ɾar~ɾiw r~ɾar~ɾabaʔ~ʡən nu tatəkuħ.
S.FORM: kina wacu mulaliw lalaba'en nu tatekuh.
S.PHON: kina waʦu mur~ɾar~ɾiw r~ɾar~ɾabaʔ~ʡən nu tatəkuħ.
S.TRANSL: 狗跑去追虎頭蜂.
That dog ran away and was chased by hornets.

S.FORM: makamelaw kya ayam tya wawa.
S.PHON: makamər~ɾaw kja ajam tja wawa.
S.FORM: makamelaw kya ayam tya wawa.
S.PHON: makamər~ɾaw kja ajam tja wawa.
S.TRANSL: 那隻鳥能看得到那個孩子.
The bird could see that child.

S.FORM: sapikalatan kya ayam tya wawa u sapikalatan kina deku' nahiya tina wawa.
S.PHON: sapikar~ɾatan kja ajam tja wawa u sapikar~ɾatan kina dəkuʔ~ʡ naħija tina wawa.
S.FORM: sapikalatan kya ayam tya wawa u sapikalatan kina deku' nahiya tina wawa.
S.PHON: sapikar~ɾatan kja ajam tja wawa u sapikar~ɾatan kina dəkuʔ~ʡ naħija tina wawa.
S.TRANSL: 貓頭鷹咬那孩子.
The owl wanted to bite the child.

S.FORM: mikilim kya kya wawa tu wacu.
S.PHON: mikir~ɾim kja kja wawa tu waʦu.
S.FORM: mikilim kya kya wawa tu wacu.
S.PHON: mikir~ɾim kja kja wawa tu waʦu.
S.TRANSL: 那孩子在找那隻狗.
The child searched for the dog.

S.FORM: mikilim kya wawa tya wacu.
S.PHON: mikir~ɾim kja wawa tja waʦu.
S.FORM: mikilim kya wawa tya wacu.
S.PHON: mikir~ɾim kja wawa tja waʦu.
S.TRANSL: 那小孩在找那隻狗.
The child searched for that dog.

S.FORM: milimek matalaw tya tatekuh.
S.PHON: mir~ɾimək matar~ɾaw tja tatəkuħ.
S.FORM: milimek matalaw tya tatekuh.
S.PHON: mir~ɾimək matar~ɾaw tja tatəkuħ.

TRANSL.notes: (那隻狗)躲起來因為害怕虎頭蜂.

S.TRANSL: 躲起來因為害怕虎頭蜂.

TRANSL.notes: (That dog) hided due to fear of hornets.

S.TRANSL: hided due to fear of hornets.

S.FORM: E mamelaw nina wawa ku ngabul.
S.PHON: ə mamər~ɾaw nina wawa ku ŋabur~ɾ.
S.FORM: E mamelaw nina wawa ku ngabul.
S.PHON: ə mamər~ɾaw nina wawa ku ŋabur~ɾ.
S.TRANSL: 這小孩看到鹿.
The child saw the deer.

S.FORM: ma u ngabul mikacaw i tiza i i i tangah nya ngabul kya wawa.
S.PHON: ma u ŋabur~ɾ mikaʦaw i tiza i i i taŋaħ nja ŋabur~ɾ kja wawa.
S.FORM: ma u ngabul mikacaw i tiza i i i tangah nya ngabul kya wawa.
S.PHON: ma u ŋabur~ɾ mikaʦaw i tiza i i i taŋaħ nja ŋabur~ɾ kja wawa.
S.TRANSL: 那孩子爬到鹿頭上.
The child climbed onto the head of the deer.

S.FORM: sipipacekisan kyai nya ngabul kya wawa mahtik i tiza i tapatapadan kina wawa.
S.PHON: sipipaʦəkisan kjai nja ŋabur~ɾ kja wawa maħtik i tiza i tapatapadan kina wawa.
S.FORM: sipipacekisan kyai nya ngabul kya wawa mahtik i tiza i tapatapadan kina wawa.
S.PHON: sipipaʦəkisan kjai nja ŋabur~ɾ kja wawa maħtik i tiza i tapatapadan kina wawa.
S.TRANSL: 那孩子可能是被鹿撞到,掉到懸崖下.
That child probably was hit by deer and fell off the cliff.

S.FORM: mahtik ciniza i tapad melaw han sa u nanum kya kahtikan niza.
S.PHON: maħtik ʦiniza i tapad mər~ɾaw ħan sa u nanum kja kaħtikan niza.
S.FORM: mahtik ciniza i tapad melaw han sa u nanum kya kahtikan niza.
S.PHON: maħtik ʦiniza i tapad mər~ɾaw ħan sa u nanum kja kaħtikan niza.
S.TRANSL: 他掉下懸崖而掉下去的地方是水裡.
He fell off the cliff and fell into water.

S.FORM: haluwacu namahtik i tiza i hiya i nanum kya kya ya wawa a tya wacu.
S.PHON: ħar~ɾuwaʦu namaħtik i tiza i ħija i nanum kja kja ja wawa a tja waʦu.
S.FORM: haluwacu namahtik i tiza i hiya i nanum kya kya ya wawa a tya wacu.
S.PHON: ħar~ɾuwaʦu namaħtik i tiza i ħija i nanum kja kja ja wawa a tja waʦu.
S.TRANSL: 連小孩跟狗都掉到水中
Even the child and dog fell into water.

S.FORM: misusu' ciniza mimelaw ciniza i labu nya nya tudem.
S.PHON: misusuʔ~ʡ ʦiniza mimər~ɾaw ʦiniza i r~ɾabu nja nja tudəm.
S.FORM: misusu' ciniza mimelaw ciniza i labu nya nya tudem.
S.PHON: misusuʔ~ʡ ʦiniza mimər~ɾaw ʦiniza i r~ɾabu nja nja tudəm.
S.TRANSL: 他伸手進去漂流木裡面.
He put his hand into the driftwood.

S.FORM: mabuhang kina kilang.
S.PHON: mabuħaŋ kina kir~ɾaŋ.
S.FORM: mabuhang kina kilang.
S.PHON: mabuħaŋ kina kir~ɾaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 樹有洞.
The tree had a hole.

S.FORM: izaw hakay i zaw i labu kyai ku mamamelawen nu mita a canacanan a adupen.
S.PHON: izaw ħakaj i zaw i r~ɾabu kjai ku mamamər~ɾawən nu mita a ʦanaʦanan a adupən.
S.FORM: izaw hakay i zaw i labu kyai ku mamamelawen nu mita a canacanan a adupen.
S.PHON: izaw ħakaj i zaw i r~ɾabu kjai ku mamamər~ɾawən nu mita a ʦanaʦanan a adupən.
S.TRANSL: 裡面可能有任何一種獵物.
What is inside may be any kind of pray.

S.FORM: akay mikilimay henay tya balaut.
S.PHON: akaj mikir~ɾimaj ħənaj tja bar~ɾaut.
S.FORM: akay mikilimay henay tya balaut.
S.PHON: akaj mikir~ɾimaj ħənaj tja bar~ɾaut.
S.TRANSL: 可能還在找那隻青蛙.
Probably they were still looking for the frog.

S.FORM: a iniwtu aca matepatu nuheni kina na balauttu.
S.PHON: a iniwtu aʦa matəpatu nuħəni kina na bar~ɾauttu.
S.FORM: a iniwtu aca matepatu nuheni kina na balauttu.
S.PHON: a iniwtu aʦa matəpatu nuħəni kina na bar~ɾauttu.
S.TRANSL: 他們就在這裡找到了青蛙.
They found frog here.

S.FORM: melaw han sa mutahkalay kya balaut mikilim kyaitu pi lucu' han kya balaut.
S.PHON: mər~ɾaw ħan sa mutaħkar~ɾaj kja bar~ɾaut mikir~ɾim kjaitu pi r~ɾuʦuʔ~ʡ ħan kja bar~ɾaut.
S.FORM: melaw han sa mutahkalay kya balaut mikilim kyaitu pi lucu' han kya balaut.
S.PHON: mər~ɾaw ħan sa mutaħkar~ɾaj kja bar~ɾaut mikir~ɾim kjaitu pi r~ɾuʦuʔ~ʡ ħan kja bar~ɾaut.
S.TRANSL: 看那隻青蛙出來有可能在找出生地.
It could be seen that the frog came out and were looking for its birthplace.

S.FORM: yadah satu kina balaut u i tiza i nanunanuman yadahtu aca ku pacainul.
S.PHON: jadaħ satu kina bar~ɾaut u i tiza i nanunanuman jadaħtu aʦa ku paʦainur~ɾ.
S.FORM: yadah satu kina balaut u i tiza i nanunanuman yadahtu aca ku pacainul.
S.PHON: jadaħ satu kina bar~ɾaut u i tiza i nanunanuman jadaħtu aʦa ku paʦainur~ɾ.
S.TRANSL: 在水裡有很多蝌蚪.
There were many tadpoles in water.

S.FORM: siwawa kina balaut.
S.PHON: siwawa kina bar~ɾaut.
S.FORM: siwawa kina balaut.
S.PHON: siwawa kina bar~ɾaut.
S.TRANSL: 那青蛙有孩子了.
The frog had children.
